name: v2rayn-control
description: Control local v2rayN groups and nodes through a Codex UserPromptSubmit hook.

interface.shortDescription: List groups, test current-group nodes, and switch by number.
interface.longDescription: Provides a .NET 8 UserPromptSubmit hook for command-style v2rayN control. The hook keeps its own current-group state, lists and auto-tests that group, switches nodes by the next numeric selection, and can auto-switch to the Nth usable current-group node through v2rayN's local named pipe IPC endpoint.
